results.aiTitle: Lost ID card used after report, security risk
results.aiResolutionText: This is a security incident requiring immediate action. Report the misuse to the Campus Security Control Room at SEC-001, Main Gate Security Block, open 24x7, contact +91-90000-10021, and update this grievance. The Discipline and Safety Office (SA-012, Student Affairs Block, Monday-Friday, 9:30 AM-5:00 PM) will coordinate blocking the card and reviewing access logs.

results.title: Street lights near hostel path are not working
results.aiTitle: Street lights out near hostel path
results.aiResolutionText: Your safety concern about non-functional street lights near the hostel path has been routed to the Campus Security Control Room for urgent review. Please report any immediate danger to the security control desk at SEC-001, Main Gate Security Block, open 24x7, or contact +91-90000-10021. The Discipline and Safety Office will coordinate with maintenance to restore lighting and may increase patrols.

results.title: Possible outsider entry near campus block
results.aiTitle: Security concern about outsider near academic block
results.aiResolutionText: Your security concern about an unfamiliar person near the academic block has been routed to the Campus Security Control Room for immediate review. For urgent or active incidents, report directly to the security control desk at Main Gate Security Block, Room SEC-001 (open 24x7, contact +91-90000-10021). The Discipline and Safety Office will follow up as needed.

results.title: Parking area has a CCTV blind spot
results.aiTitle: CCTV blind spot reported in hostel parking area
results.aiResolutionText: Your CCTV blind spot concern in the hostel parking area has been routed to the Campus Security Control Room for review. For urgent safety issues, report immediately to the security control room at Main Gate Security Block, Ground Floor, Room SEC-001 (24x7, phone: +91-90000-10021).

results.title: Revaluation result is still not published
results.aiTitle: Revaluation result not published after application
results.aiResolutionText: Your revaluation result is pending publication. Please visit the Revaluation Desk in Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Room A-022, Monday-Friday, 10:30 AM-4:30 PM, or email examcell@college.edu with your roll number, subject code, and original result date for assistance.

results.title: Evaluated answer script copy request is pending
results.aiTitle: Evaluated answer script copy request pending
results.aiResolutionText: Your evaluated answer script copy request is pending. Please contact the Revaluation Desk in Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Room A-022, Monday-Friday, 10:30 AM-4:30 PM, or email examcell@college.edu with your roll number, subject code, and original result date for assistance.

results.title: Revaluation fee payment is not reflected
results.aiTitle: Revaluation fee payment not reflected in portal
results.aiResolutionText: Your revaluation fee payment issue is a routine administrative correction. Please visit the Revaluation Desk in Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Room A-022, Monday-Friday, 10:30 AM-4:30 PM, or email examcell@college.edu with your roll number, subject code, and original result publication date for verification and ledger update.

results.title: Consolidated marksheet not updated after revaluation change
results.aiTitle: Consolidated marksheet not updated after revaluation
results.aiResolutionText: Your consolidated marksheet needs to be updated to reflect the revaluation change. Please visit the Examination Cell in Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Room A-020, Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-5:00 PM, or email examcell@college.edu with your roll number, subject code, and semester details for verification and regeneration.

results.title: Photocopy request status is stuck in processing
results.aiTitle: Answer script photocopy request stuck in processing
results.aiResolutionText: Your answer script photocopy request is delayed. Please contact the Revaluation Desk in Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Room A-022, Monday-Friday, 10:30 AM-4:30 PM, or email examcell@college.edu with your exam, subject code, and original result publication date for assistance.

results.title: Two elective exams are scheduled at the same time
results.aiTitle: Elective exam schedule overlap
results.aiResolutionText: Your elective exam schedule overlap has been forwarded to the Exam Scheduling Desk in Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Room A-024, open Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-5:00 PM. Please contact examcell@college.edu with your roll number, subject codes, and a copy of your timetable for verification and correction.

results.title: Practical exam clashes with project review schedule
results.aiTitle: Practical exam clashes with mandatory project review
results.aiResolutionText: Your practical exam and project review schedule clash has been forwarded to the Exam Scheduling Desk in Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Room A-024, open Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-5:00 PM. Please contact examcell@college.edu with your roll number, subject codes, semester details, and timetable copy for resolution.

results.title: Revised exam timetable is not updated in portal
results.aiTitle: Revised exam timetable not updated in portal
results.aiResolutionText: The revised exam timetable update issue has been routed to the Examination Cell. Please visit the Exam coordination desk in Room A-020, Academic Block A, Ground Floor (Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-5:00 PM) or email examcell@college.edu with your roll number and subject details. The team will clear the cached version and republish the corrected schedule.

results.title: Exam venue change was communicated too late
results.aiTitle: Late communication of exam venue change
results.aiResolutionText: Your grievance about late communication of an exam venue change has been forwarded to the Examination Cell for review and corrective action. Please contact the Exam coordination desk in Room A-020, Academic Block A, Ground Floor (Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-5:00 PM) or email examcell@college.edu for updates, and keep your roll number and subject details ready.

results.title: Supplementary exam date is unclear
results.aiTitle: Supplementary exam date unclear in notice
results.aiResolutionText: Please contact the Exam coordination desk in Room A-020, Academic Block A, Ground Floor (Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-5:00 PM) or email examcell@college.edu to clarify the final supplementary exam date. Have your roll number, subject code, and semester details ready.

results.title: Hall ticket is blocked even though dues were cleared
results.aiTitle: Hall ticket blocked despite cleared dues
results.aiResolutionText: Your hall ticket is blocked due to a finance clearance flag not being refreshed after payment. Please visit the Hall-ticket correction desk in room A-026, Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-5:00 PM, or email examcell@college.edu. Carry a payment receipt and your roll number for verification.

results.title: Hall ticket has a spelling mistake in my name
results.aiTitle: Hall ticket name spelling error
results.aiResolutionText: Please visit the Hall Ticket Help Desk (Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Room A-026, Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-5:00 PM) with your roll number and identity proof to correct the spelling error on your hall ticket. Carry a printout or screenshot of the issue for reference.

results.title: Elective subject is missing on hall ticket
results.aiTitle: Elective missing on hall ticket
results.aiResolutionText: Please visit the Hall Ticket Help Desk (Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Room A-026, Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-5:00 PM) with your roll number, subject code, semester details, and a screenshot of the elective in the registration portal. The desk handles hall-ticket corrections and can verify and update your record.

results.title: Hall ticket is missing my profile photo
results.aiTitle: Hall ticket missing profile photo before exam
results.aiResolutionText: Your hall ticket missing the profile photo is a known issue due to image sync failure. Visit the Hall Ticket Help Desk in Academic Block A, Ground Floor, Room A-026, Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-5:00 PM, with your roll number and hall ticket details. The desk can rerun the sync to regenerate your hall ticket with the photo.

results.title: Need confidential handling for repeated inappropriate comments
results.aiTitle: Confidential PoSH complaint for repeated inappropriate comments
results.aiResolutionText: Your confidential PoSH complaint has been routed to the Internal Complaints Committee (ICC) for protected handling. Contact the ICC confidential intake desk at the Student Support Center, Second Floor, Room SSC-207, Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-4:00 PM, or email icc@college.edu for next steps. Use confidential channels and avoid sharing details publicly.

Use confidential reporting channels and avoid sharing details publicly.

results.title: Need to report senior intimidation in hostel corridor
results.aiTitle: Senior intimidation in hostel corridor reported for anti-ragging
results.aiResolutionText: Your anti-ragging complaint has been received and will be handled confidentially. Please contact the Anti-Ragging and ICC Support Desk at SSC-209 (Student Support Center, Second Floor) during open hours (Monday-Friday, 10:00 AM-4:00 PM) or email icc@college.edu for protected intake. Avoid sharing details publicly and use confidential channels only.

results.aiResolutionText: Your anti-ragging complaint has been received and will be handled confidentially. Use confidential reporting channels and avoid sharing details in public spaces.
